title: azorella cuneifolia
intro: Azorella cuneifolia, also known as Mountain Pepper or Kana Keoki, is a perennial plant native to the southern hemisphere, particularly in New Zealand and Chile. The medicinal properties of Azorella cuneifolia are attributed to its essential oils, which have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Azorella cuneifolia include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Azorella cuneifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to address skin irritations and wounds.
